autonomous-firefighting-robot.description: 25–28 kg tracked robot that finds and extinguishes fires: FPGA-deployed CNN, multi-sensor fusion.

mtk-firmware-unlock.description: Python toolchain for MediaTek bootloader unlock, firmware extraction, and root.

truenas-zfs-recovery-lab.description: Deliberately destroyed a RAID-Z array, then recovered it with CLI and forensic tooling.
